column9: Risk management obligation — direct transposition of NIS2 Art.21.1 into BSIG new.
Management body accountability — NIS2 Art.20.1 billigung.
Management training obligation — NIS2 Art.20.2 Schulungspflicht.
Supply chain oversight — NIS2 Art.22.1 Commission oversight.
